name: Bullshot
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vodka, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and Tabasco sauce in a shaker filled with ice.
2. Shake well until chilled.
3. Strain into an old-fashioned glass over fresh ice.
4. Add the beef bullion to the glass and stir gently until hot.
5. Stir in the remaining Tabasco sauce and serve immediately.
